result.summary: United Rentals publicly advertises customer-specific API integrations for Total Control/system integration, but no public developer API reference, machine-readable spec, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on unitedrentals.com could be confirmed.
result.description: United Rentals is an equipment rental company offering fleet, billing, and worksite-management services through its Total Control platform. Its website describes digital system integration capabilities for customers, but public technical integration documentation was not exposed on the mapped domain.
